mapper.insert: INSERT INTO benefit ( plcy_no, plcy_nm, category_code, sprvsn_inst_cd_nm, target_desc, plcy_sprt_cn, support_amount, plcy_aply_mthd_cn, sbmsn_dcmnt_cn, apply_start_date, apply_end_date, aply_ymd, aply_url_addr, sprt_trgt_min_age, sprt_trgt_max_age, earn_cnd_se_cd, earn_min_amt, earn_max_amt, earn_etc_cn, mrg_stts_cd, plcy_major_cd, school_cd, job_cd, conflict_group_code, inq_cnt, is_active, frst_reg_dt, last_mdfcn_dt, plcy_expln_cn ) VALUES ( #{plcyNo}, #{plcyNm}, #{categoryCode}, #{sprvsnInstCdNm}, #{targetDesc}, #{plcySprtCn}, #{supportAmount}, #{plcyAplyMthdCn}, #{sbmsnDcmntCn}, #{applyStartDate}, #{applyEndDate}, #{aplyYmd}, #{aplyUrlAddr}, #{sprtTrgtMinAge}, #{sprtTrgtMaxAge}, #{earnCndSeCd}, #{earnMinAmt}, #{earnMaxAmt}, #{earnEtcCn}, #{mrgSttsCd}, #{plcyMajorCd}, #{schoolCd}, #{jobCd}, #{conflictGroupCode}, IFNULL(#{inqCnt}, 0), IFNULL(#{isActive}, 'Y'), IFNULL(#{frstRegDt}, NOW()), NOW(), #{plcyExplnCn} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE plcy_nm = VALUES(plcy_nm), category_code = VALUES(category_code), sprvsn_inst_cd_nm = VALUES(sprvsn_inst_cd_nm), target_desc = VALUES(target_desc), plcy_sprt_cn = VALUES(plcy_sprt_cn), support_amount = VALUES(support_amount), plcy_aply_mthd_cn = VALUES(plcy_aply_mthd_cn), sbmsn_dcmnt_cn = VALUES(sbmsn_dcmnt_cn), apply_start_date = VALUES(apply_start_date), apply_end_date = VALUES(apply_end_date), aply_ymd = VALUES(aply_ymd), aply_url_addr = VALUES(aply_url_addr), sprt_trgt_min_age = VALUES(sprt_trgt_min_age), sprt_trgt_max_age = VALUES(sprt_trgt_max_age), earn_cnd_se_cd = VALUES(earn_cnd_se_cd), earn_min_amt = VALUES(earn_min_amt), earn_max_amt = VALUES(earn_max_amt), earn_etc_cn = VALUES(earn_etc_cn), mrg_stts_cd = VALUES(mrg_stts_cd), plcy_major_cd = VALUES(plcy_major_cd), school_cd = VALUES(school_cd), job_cd = VALUES(job_cd), inq_cnt = VALUES(inq_cnt), is_active = VALUES(is_active), last_mdfcn_dt = NOW(), plcy_expln_cn = VALUES(plcy_expln_cn)
